identity.name: VetConnect Global
identity.target: Duenos de mascotas que buscan atencion veterinaria confiable, veterinarios y clinicas que quieren ampliar su alcance, voluntarios y organizaciones de rescate animal, ciudadanos que desean ayudar animales en situacion de calle

primary.use: elementos principales, CTA, headers, navegacion activa
primary.name: Teal Trust

secondary.use: acentos, badges de salud, indicadores positivos, confirmaciones
secondary.name: Vida Green

accent.use: detalles decorativos, notificaciones, alertas suaves, estrellas de rating
accent.name: Warm Amber

text_dark.use: texto sobre fondo claro, titulos, body text
text_dark.name: Deep Navy

text_light.use: texto sobre fondo oscuro, texto en headers con fondo de color
text_light.name: Soft Ice

success.use: exito, vacunas al dia, verificaciones completadas

heading.use: titulos, headers de seccion, nombres de pantalla

body.use: texto de cuerpo, descripciones, contenido medico, listas

accent.use: slogan, badges, etiquetas, elementos amigables y cercanos

spacing.note: Base 4px. Multiplica por la escala. Mobile-first: usar sm/md como defaults.

border_radius.note: Esquinas redondeadas suaves para transmitir calidez. Cards con md, botones con lg, avatares con full.

shadows.note: Sombras suaves con base del text_dark. Elevar con sm para cards, md para modales, lg para dropdowns.

app_icon.note: Icono para app stores iOS y Android

prompt_ingredients.photo_style: Warm, natural lighting photographs of pets and veterinarians interacting. Genuine emotional moments between animals and their caregivers. Clean clinical environments balanced with warmth. Soft depth of field, pastel tones with teal and green accents. Mobile-optimized compositions with clear focal points.
prompt_ingredients.logo_style: Modern minimalist icon combining a paw print with a medical cross or heart shape. Clean geometric lines with rounded corners. Teal primary color (#2B7A9E) with optional green accent (#4CAF7D). Works at small sizes for mobile app icon. No fine details that get lost at 32px.
prompt_ingredients.avoid_global: watermark, text overlay, UI elements, borders, frame, cartoon, 3D render, low quality, blurry, pixelated, oversaturated, deformed animals, scary medical imagery, needles, blood, aggressive animals, dark moody lighting
